audit_items.proof_trace: The file contains zero dynamic memory allocation calls (no kmalloc, kzalloc, vmalloc, devm_*, or equivalent). The only 'alloc' token is a function pointer assignment (.vnic_alloc = nfp_app_nic_vnic_alloc) in a static const struct — not a heap allocation. The property forall alloc(p): exists free(p) is vacuously satisfied.
